/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_ofh_transmitter.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_data_flow_cplane_scheduling_commands_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_data_flow_uplane_downlink_data_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_downlink_handler_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_message_transmitter_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_uplane_fragment_size_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_uplink_request_handler_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_uplink_request_handler_task_dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_transmitter_factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ofh_transmitter.dir/ofh_transmitter_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_ofh_transmitter.a
